CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100116932) FILED BY DEFENDANT FERRY, JAMES ASHLEY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501,DEFENDANT JAMES FERRY NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH FINAL LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT ORDERED PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS IN ITS RULING ON THE MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF ADDED SEVERAL CONCLUSORY ALLEGATIONS AND NO FACTS. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS (NOT CONCLUSIONS) SHOWING THAT THE REIMBURSEMENT FOR EXPENSES AND LABOR THAT WENT INTO THE LISTING AND SELLING OF THE PROPERTY IS COVERED BY 1983 WRITTEN PARTNERSHIP AGREEMENT (ATTACHING THE AGREEMENT AND POINTING TO RELEVANT PROVISIONS MAY BE ONE WAY TO MAKE THE PROPER ALLEGATIONS) AND THAT TRANSFER OF $40,000 WAS A PROFIT SHARING BY THE PARTNERS (FACTS REGARDING THE TERMS OF THE PROFIT SHARING RELATED TO $40,000 PAYMENT IN EXCHANGE FOR DEEDS AND HOW THIS TRANSFER IS BASED ON/I FURTHERANCE OF THE PARTNERSHIP AGREEMENT) UNRELATED TO A DISCRETE TRANSACTION RE: PORTIONS OF FRONT AND BACK YARDS. ALL ALLEGATIONS SHALL BE MADE IN GOOD FAITH AND ADDRESS THE SHAM PLEADING ISSUE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JAMES FERRY's MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD Amended COMPLAINT is DENIED. Additional allegations in support of Plaintiff's theory of the case are not a sham pleading. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2021 Continued To Apr-21-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2020 Continued To Feb-17-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JAMES FERRY Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED with final leave to amend. The Court ordered Plaintiff to allege facts in its ruling on the Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint. Plaintiff added several conclusory allegations and no facts. Defendant's Motion to Strike Second Amended Complaint is granted with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts (not conclusions) showing that the reimbursement for expenses and labor that went into the listing and selling of the property is covered by 1983 written partnership agreement (attaching the agreement and pointing to relevant provisions may be one way to make the proper allegations) and that transfer of $40,000 was a profit sharing by the partners (facts regarding the terms of the profit sharing related to $40,000 payment in exchange for deeds and how this transfer is based on/I furtherance of the partnership agreement) unrelated to a discrete transaction re: portions of front and back yards. All allegations shall be made in good faith and address the sham pleading issue. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2020 Continued To Dec-16-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant James Ferry Motion To Strike 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-27-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint is granted with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts showing that the reimbursement for expenses and labor that went into the listing and selling of the property is covered by 1983 written partnership agreement and that transfer of $40,000 was a profit sharing by the partners unrelated to a discrete transaction re: portions of front and back yards.Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-27-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JAMES FERRY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date at the same time. That department handles all cases arising from the sale/acquisition of real property per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, NOT Reported. =(302/EPS)
